{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Dragon Court
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Dragon Court]] convicted [[Queen Shyrax]] of high treachery.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Dragon Court]] convicted [[Shyrax the Third]] of treason.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Convicted by the Dragon Court of high treachery and imprisoned about eight months ago.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
